summary: Specification phases 1-4 complete. Requirements cover 49 functional requirements across iSCSI (REQ-ISCSI-01..08), SCSI (REQ-SCSI-01..05), ZTL (REQ-ZTL-01..08), GC (REQ-GC-01..08), Backend (REQ-BACKEND-01..05), WAL (REQ-WAL-01..06), API (REQ-API-01..04), UI (REQ-UI-01..05), and Configuration (REQ-CFG-01..04). Design covers full architecture with ASCII diagrams, L2P table design (8KB segment granularity, ~4GB RAM for 4TB device), GC algorithm with CAS-based race-free migration, SG_IO ZBC binary protocol, WAL record format, and Docker multi-stage build. Implementation tasks broken into 50 tasks across 11 phases (A-K) with a prioritized first vertical slice.
key_decisions: L2P granularity: 8KB segments (configurable) for ~4GB RAM on 4TB device
L2P concurrent access: atomic.Uint64 + CAS, no mutex on hot path
GC migration race: CAS-based conflict detection, foreground write wins
WAL group commit: configurable 10ms batch window for performance
SMR backend: pure Go SG_IO ioctl via syscall.Syscall6, no CGO
Build tags: //go:build linux for SMR package
UNMAP: implement as L2P invalidation (no physical zero-write)
Zone write pointer: always reconciled from device via ReportZones after crash recovery
